entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop affected by various virus diseases in the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: VIRUS DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by viruses affecting groundnut, some of which are economically important

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographical region where several groundnut virus diseases occur

entities.name: PEANUT MOTTLE VIRUS
entities.description: A widespread virus that causes considerable yield losses in groundnut

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity caused by virus infections

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE
entities.description: A virus disease of groundnut important in Africa south of the Sahara

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where groundnut rosette is an important disease

entities.name: PEANUT CLUMP VIRUS
entities.description: A virus causing peanut clump disease in West Africa and India

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region where peanut clump virus occurs

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A region where peanut clump virus and bud necrosis occur

entities.name: BUD NECROSIS
entities.description: A groundnut disease caused by tomato spotted wilt virus

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS
entities.description: The virus responsible for causing bud necrosis in groundnut

entities.name: WITCHES' BROOM
entities.description: A groundnut disease associated with mycoplasma-like organisms

entities.name: MYCOPLASMA-LIKE ORGANISMS
entities.description: Organisms associated with the cause of witches' broom disease

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: The region where witches' broom disease occurs
